title: ModelAdapter híbrido, proveedores y CostGuard
commands: python -m devpilot_core model generate --provider mock --prompt "Diseñar agente documental" --json
python -m devpilot_core model classify --provider mock --text "bug detectado" --labels "bug,feature" --json
python -m devpilot_core model embed --provider mock --text "vector estable" --json
pass_criteria: CostGuard blocks external API providers by default.
No API keys or network calls are required.
block_criteria: External API usage without explicit policy/budget.
Raw API key in provider config.
Real provider network call during Sprint 17.
risks: No real token accounting or billing integration.
No semantic quality evaluation for model outputs yet.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-18 — Preparación de Desktop/Web sin implementar UI completa
